description: baseFolder and data dir are absolute L: drive strings

description: analysis and plotting parameters are inline constants/no config snapshot

description: try/catch prints and continues on per-file import errors

description: field and mass extracted only from filename regex
recommended_contract_fix: prefer header metadata first with filename as explicit fallback + provenance column

description: system type inferred from first file only

description: pipeline generates figures only with no machine-readable observables

description: cleaning decisions (removed points/gap interpolation) not exported

description: temperature segment boundaries not exported as table

description: no strict fail-fast rules or execution_status artifact
